    Hook 'Em Up Frenzy

    1. Overview

    The goal is to obtain a winning combination on a winning way spread across the reels.

    Game specifications:

    Type

    Slots

    Number of reels

    5

    Number of rows

    3

    Number of ways

    243 (cannot be changed)

    Number of coins you can bet

    30 (cannot be changed)

    Progressive

    No

    Double feature

    No

    Auto spin feature

    Yes

    Wild symbols

    Yes

    Multiplier symbols

    Yes

    Scatter symbols

    Yes

    Bonus round

    No

    Free spins

    Yes

    Instant win

    No

    RTP

    Standard Play: 94.03%

    The game disconnects if you do not take any actions for a specific number of consecutive minutes (this number varies depending on jurisdiction); the session recovery feature will save the game progress so that the next time the game is loaded, you can continue where you left off.

    In the event of technical difficulties resulting in a dropped connection to the game server, the game you were playing is saved automatically and will load the next time you establish a connection to the game server. You will not be able to reconnect to the game server for the first 30 seconds after the disconnection.

    Note: In case of malfunction all pays and play are voided; any bet that was not yet accepted will be voided, any bet that was unsettled will be refunded.

    2. How to Play

    Note: If you do not have enough money to play a game, the bet can be set to the minimum selectable amount through a dialog window informing about this.

    All winning ways pay from left to right. Winnings on different ways are all added. Only the highest winning combination on each way is paid. Winnings from Free Spins are added to the total win.

    The auto spin feature does not automatically start free spins - player input is required.(Available only for specific jurisdictions)

    On the info bar, you can view the current BET, your BALANCE and your current WIN, displayed in either credit or your real currency, depending on the current user's choice (Available only for specific jurisdictions). To toggle between credit or your real currency, click in the BALANCE area (Available only for specific jurisdictions).

    2.1. Desktop version

    To play, follow these steps:

    1. Click on the main screen, and then use the + and - buttons to select a coin value. Click to save the settings and return to the main screen.
    2. Note: The total BET is displayed in either credit or your real currency, depending on the current user's choice (Available only for specific jurisdictions). To toggle between credit or your real currency, click in the BALANCE area (Available only for specific jurisdictions).
    3. Click to place the bet and spin the reels one time.

    The total amount won will be shown in the WIN field from the info bar, in either credit or your real currency, depending on the current user's choice (Available only for specific jurisdictions). For each winning combination, the amount won is the amount shown in the paytable for that winning combination.

    To toggle between credit or your real currency, click in the BALANCE area (Available only for specific jurisdictions).

    2.2. Mobile version

    To play, follow these steps:

    1. Tap on the main screen, then use the + and - buttons to select a coin value. Tap to save the settings and return to the main screen.
    2. Note: The total BET is displayed in either credit or your real currency, depending on the current user's choice (Available only for specific jurisdictions). To toggle between credit or your real currency, tap in the BALANCE area (Available only for specific jurisdictions).
    3. Tap to place the bet and spin the reels one time.

    The total amount won will be shown in the WIN field from the info bar, in either credit or your real currency, depending on the current user's choice (Available only for specific jurisdictions). For each winning combination, the amount won is the amount shown in the paytable for that winning combination.

    To toggle between credit or your real currency, tap in the BALANCE area (Available only for specific jurisdictions).

    3. Special Symbols and Features

    3.1. Wild

    The WILD symbol replaces any other symbols, except the Bonus symbols, to form winning combinations.

    Note: If no specific payouts for WILD are displayed in the pay table, a combination formed exclusively with WILD will pay just like the highest paying symbol, if that combination is the highest winning combination on a way.

    3.2. Bonus symbol

    Landing 3 Bonus symbols on reels 1, 3 and 5 will trigger 8 Free Spins.

    3.3. Wild Bass symbol

    Any Wild Bass symbol that lands in view can activate a win multiplier.

    Multipliers will multiply each other, up to 243x.

    Note: Wild Bass is also WILD and substitutes for all symbols except Bonus.

    3.4. Go Fishin' Spin

    Go Fishin' Spin can trigger randomly on any base game spin, landing up to 3 Wild Bass symbols.

    Any Wild Bass symbols in view will increase the multiplier. Wild Bass symbols are also WILD.

    Note: Multipliers will multiply each other, up to 27x.

    3.5. Free Spins

    Landing 3 Bonus symbols on reels 1, 3 and 5 will trigger 8 Free Spins.

    Landing a Wild Bass (x2) in view will activate a x2 win multiplier. Landing the second Wild Bass (x3) on the same reel will boost the multiplier to x3.

    The maximum Wild Bass available is x3.

    Multipliers will multiply each other, up to 243x.

    Note: Active all 5 Wild Bass multipliers for 5 additional Free Spins and a multiplier extravaganza.

    4. Other game buttons

    4.1. Desktop version

    The following buttons are available:

     

    Click this button to toggle the game sound on or off.
     

    Click this button to open the PAYOUTS tab, where you can view several screens:

    • information about the payouts for the winning combinations, in either credit or your real currency - to toggle between credit or your real currency, click in the BALANCE area.
    • information about any existing special features or special symbols and their payouts, or specific awards;
    • basic game rules.

    To navigate among the various screens in the PAYOUTS tab, click on the left and right arrows at the bottom of the screen.

    RULES

    In the last of the screens from the PAYOUTS tab, click this button to view detailed game rules, in a new browser window.
     

    (in real mode only) This button can be found in the PAYOUTS screen, in the BET settings screen and in the AUTO SPIN screen (available only for specific jurisdictions). Click on it to view the gameplay history, in a new browser window.
     

    This button can be found in the PAYOUTS screen, in the BET settings screen and in the AUTO SPIN screen (available only for specific jurisdictions). Click on it to close the game and to open the home website, in the same browser window.
     

    (available while the reels are spinning) Click this button to stop the reels earlier.
     

    (available during winning animations) Click this button to skip the winning animations.
     

    (available only for specific jurisdictions) Click this button to activate Turbo mode.
    The Turbo mode speeds up the gameplay - the spin time is reduced to a minimum.

    4.2. Mobile version

    The following buttons are available:

     

    Click this button to toggle the game sound on or off.
     

    Click this button to open the PAYOUTS tab, where you can view several screens:

    • information about the payouts for the winning combinations, in either credit or your real currency - to toggle between credit or your real currency, click in the BALANCE area.
    • information about any existing special features or special symbols and their payouts, or specific awards;
    • basic game rules.

    To navigate among the various screens in the PAYOUTS tab, click on the left and right arrows at the bottom of the screen.

    RULES

    In the last of the screens from the PAYOUTS tab, click this button to view detailed game rules, in a new browser window.
     

    (in real mode only) This button can be found in the PAYOUTS screen, in the BET settings screen and in the AUTO SPIN screen (available only for specific jurisdictions). Click on it to view the gameplay history, in a new browser window.
     

    This button can be found in the PAYOUTS screen, in the BET settings screen and in the AUTO SPIN screen (available only for specific jurisdictions). Click on it to close the game and to open the home website, in the same browser window.
     

    (available while the reels are spinning) Click this button to stop the reels earlier.
     

    (available during winning animations) Click this button to skip the winning animations.
     

    (available only for specific jurisdictions) Click this button to activate Turbo mode.
    The Turbo mode speeds up the gameplay - the spin time is reduced to a minimum.

    5. Auto spin feature

    The loss limit setting allows stopping the auto spin feature automatically when the selected limit, plus your cumulative winnings, and minus your cumulative bets, is less than 0.

    5.1. Desktop version

    Click the AUTO SPIN button to open the AUTO SPIN settings window where you can set up the following:

    • Number of auto spins: click + or - to select the number of auto spins to play.
    • Loss limit: click + or - to select the value of the loss limit;
    • Stop if a win reaches: click + or - to select the value of the maximum win;
    • Stop if JACKPOT is won (only for games with Progressive Jackpots): to enable this setting, tick the checkbox; to disable it, remove the tick.

    Click the ACTIVATE  button to close the AUTO SPIN settings window and to start the auto spin feature with the currently selected bet and auto spin setup. Click the CLOSE  button to close the window without starting the auto spin feature.

    Click the STOP AUTO SPIN button to stop the auto spin feature at any time.

    5.2. Mobile version

    Tap the AUTO SPIN button to open the AUTO SPIN settings window where you can set up the following:

    • Number of auto spins: tap + or - to select the number of auto spins to play.
    • Loss limit: tap + or - to select the value of the loss limit;
    • Stop if a win reaches: tap + or - to select the value of the maximum win;
    • Stop if JACKPOT is won (only for games with Progressive Jackpots): to enable this setting, tick the checkbox; to disable it, remove the tick.

    Tap the ACTIVATE  button to close the SPIN settings window and to start the auto spin feature with the currently selected bet and auto spin setup. Tap the CLOSE button to close the window without starting the auto spin feature.

    Tap the STOP AUTO SPIN button to stop the auto spin feature at any time.

    Last modification date: 6/22/2023
